items.name: Field Medkit
items.description: Restores full health. There are a limited number of these in the game. You get one at the start of the game and others are available from the Merchant as you progress.

items.name: Sterile Band
items.description: A clean bandage used to treat minor wounds. Restores a small amount of health.

items.name: Antiseptic
items.description: A small vial of antiseptic used to disinfect wounds. Can be combined with other medical supplies.

items.name: Treat Band
items.description: A sterile bandage treated with antiseptic. Restores a moderate amount of health.

items.name: Handgun Ammo
items.description: Standard handgun cartridges used by most sidearms.

items.name: SMG Ammo
items.description: Lightweight cartridges designed for high-rate-of-fire submachine guns.

items.name: Pack Upgrade
items.description: A reinforced expansion for your field pack that permanently increases inventory capacity.
